title: RED THREAD: The exam that built modern China
summary_full: Welcome to Red Thread, Euractiv’s weekly newsletter on the EU’s relationship with China and the wider Asia-Pacific. I’m Christina Zhao in Oceania, joined by Anupriya Datta in Europe. This week, we explore whether the promise that helped power China’s rise is beginning to fray… Students after sitting China’s 2026 National College Entrance Exam in the Hunan Province (Photo by Yang Huafeng […]
